// BloomMeta — embed copyright/creator/license metadata into image FILES using
// Bloom's own libpalaso ClearShare API, so Bloom reads it back identically.
//
// WHY THIS EXISTS:
//   Bloom treats each image file's embedded metadata (XMP/EXIF) as the source of
//   truth. On load/save it runs ImageUpdater.UpdateImgMetadataAttributesToMatchImage(),
//   which READS metadata from the file and REWRITES the <img> data-copyright /
//   data-creator / data-license attributes from it (removing them when the file has
//   none). So setting those HTML attributes alone does NOT stick — you must write the
//   metadata into the image files. This tool does that with the exact same library
//   Bloom uses, guaranteeing a clean round-trip.
//
// BUILD/RUN: see ../SKILL.md. Target net8.0-windows; run from Bloom's
//   output/Debug/AnyCPU folder so transitive dependencies resolve.
//
// Args: <bookFolder> <birds.json> <manifest.json> <out-results.json> [--test]

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;
using SIL.Core.ClearShare;
using SIL.Windows.Forms.ClearShare;

class BloomMeta
{
    static string ExtractVersion(string s)
    {
        var m = Regex.Match(s ?? "", @"(\d+\.\d+)");
        return m.Success ? m.Value : null;
    }

    static LicenseInfo MakeLicense(string raw)
    {
        var s = (raw ?? "").Trim();
        var low = s.ToLowerInvariant();
        try
        {
            if (low.StartsWith("cc by-sa") || low.StartsWith("cc-by-sa"))
                return CreativeCommonsLicense.FromLicenseUrl("http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/" + (ExtractVersion(s) ?? "4.0") + "/");
            if (low.StartsWith("cc by") || low.StartsWith("cc-by"))
                return CreativeCommonsLicense.FromLicenseUrl("http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/" + (ExtractVersion(s) ?? "4.0") + "/");
            if (low == "cc0" || low.Contains("public domain"))
                return CreativeCommonsLicense.FromLicenseUrl("http://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/");
        }
        catch { }
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(s))
            return new CustomLicense() { RightsStatement = s };
        return new SIL.Core.ClearShare.NullLicense();
    }

    static void WriteOne(string path, string copyright, string creator, string licenseRaw)
    {
        var m = new Metadata();
        m.CopyrightNotice = copyright ?? "";
        m.Creator = creator ?? "";
        m.License = MakeLicense(licenseRaw);
        m.WriteIntellectualPropertyOnly(path); // writes IP into the existing image file
    }

    static int Main(string[] args)
    {
        string book = args[0], birdsPath = args[1], manifestPath = args[2], outPath = args[3];
        bool test = args.Length > 4 && args[4] == "--test";

        var birds = JArray.Parse(File.ReadAllText(birdsPath));
        var manifest = JArray.Parse(File.ReadAllText(manifestPath));
        var okRows = new HashSet<int>(manifest.Where(m => (bool)m["ok"]).Select(m => (int)m["row"]));

        if (test)
        {
            var b = birds.First(x => okRows.Contains((int)x["row"]));
            int row = (int)b["row"];
            string file = "b" + (row - 1).ToString("D3") + ".jpg";
            string tmp = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), "meta_rt.jpg");
            File.Copy(Path.Combine(book, file), tmp, true);
            WriteOne(tmp, (string)b["copyright"], (string)b["photographer"], (string)b["licenseRaw"]);
            var r = Metadata.FromFile(tmp);
            Console.WriteLine("TEST file: " + file);
            Console.WriteLine("  copyright: " + r.CopyrightNotice);
            Console.WriteLine("  creator:   " + r.Creator);
            Console.WriteLine("  license.ToString(): " + (r.License == null ? "<null>" : r.License.ToString()));
            Console.WriteLine("  IsEmpty: " + r.IsEmpty);
            return 0;
        }

        var results = new JArray();
        int done = 0, failed = 0;
        foreach (var b in birds)
        {
            int row = (int)b["row"];
            if (!okRows.Contains(row)) continue;
            string file = "b" + (row - 1).ToString("D3") + ".jpg";
            string path = Path.Combine(book, file);
            if (!File.Exists(path)) continue;
            try
            {
                WriteOne(path, (string)b["copyright"], (string)b["photographer"], (string)b["licenseRaw"]);
                var r = Metadata.FromFile(path);
                var jo = new JObject();
                jo["file"] = file;
                jo["copyright"] = r.CopyrightNotice ?? "";
                jo["creator"] = r.Creator ?? "";
                jo["license"] = r.License == null ? "" : r.License.ToString();
                results.Add(jo);
                done++;
            }
            catch (Exception e)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("FAIL " + file + ": " + e.Message);
                failed++;
            }
        }
        File.WriteAllText(outPath, results.ToString());
        Console.WriteLine("Embedded metadata into " + done + " images, " + failed + " failed. Results -> " + outPath);
        return 0;
    }
}
